title: T-015 — POST /api/scheduler/assignments/:id/override
prompt:
# T-015 — POST /api/scheduler/assignments/:id/override

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.2 override, §9.3 business rules, §15.4 V-SCHED-02/03/04/08
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement override endpoint with cross-field validators V-SCHED-02 (allergen compat), V-SCHED-03 (cascade), V-SCHED-04 (no overlap), V-SCHED-08 (reason_code required).

## Implementation contract
1. Route `apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/assignments/[assignmentId]/override/route.ts`: POST body { user_id, new_line_id, new_planned_start_time, new_shift_id, reason_code, reason_notes }.
2. Zod schema requires reason_code (V-SCHED-08).
3. Validators: V-SCHED-02 (production_lines.allergen_constraints + items.allergen_profiles match), V-SCHED-03 (parent WO planned_end_time <= new start), V-SCHED-04 (no overlap on same (new_line_id, time window)).
4. Transaction: UPDATE scheduler_assignments SET status='overridden', override_original_*, new fields; UPDATE work_orders; INSERT outbox_events scheduler.assignment.overridden.

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/assignments/[assignmentId]/override/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/override-validators.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/assignments/[assignmentId]/override/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a valid override + Planner role, when POST runs, then status='overridden', override_original_* preserved, new fields written, outbox emitted (one transaction)
2. Given new_line_id incompatible with item allergen, when POST runs, then 422 returned with V-SCHED-02 error code
3. Given an overlapping assignment on (new_line_id, time_window), when POST runs, then 422 returned with V-SCHED-04 error code
4. Given missing reason_code, when POST runs, then 400 returned (Zod V-SCHED-08)

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/route.test.ts covering all four validators + happy path
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/assignments/override'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip allergen compatibility check (BRCGS audit risk per §5.2.6)
- Do not bypass cross-tenant RLS
- Do not allow override without reason_code (V-SCHED-08)

pipeline_inputs.description: Override assignment: cross-field validators V-SCHED-02/03/04/08 + transactional write + outbox event.
pipeline_inputs.details: Endpoint enforces four validators in order: 02 allergen compat, 03 cascade DAG, 04 no overlap, 08 reason_code required. Single transaction writes status flip + override_original_* + new fields + outbox event scheduler.assignment.overridden. Returns structured error per validator.

Do not implement bulk override (not in PRD)
Do not consume outbox event here
